feedback.text: Hello I hope this feedback finds you well I wanted to give my feedback on digitally owning video games and to prevent corporations from taking our purchases away due to a legal loophole in the consenting forms and to permanently own the titles we purchased and not liscense that could end on a corporate whim that's why I signed up for the stop killing games I am also advocating for the preservation of older video games titles aswell as I and many others consider many of these games an art form and we wish to prevent older titles and newer to be left behind never to be appreciated by younger generations who adore video games
